name: zero_gdn3_diagnostic_exp025
hypothesis: DECISIVE DIAGNOSTIC (Phase-3 ## DEPARTURES): make every GDN3-upgraded layer a pure IDENTITY (return hidden_states unchanged) so the model = frozen full-attention layers + frozen LM head + residuals with GDN3 as no-ops. If tokacc stays ~0.30 with GDN3 IDENTITY, the frozen path fully produces the format and GDN3 is irrelevant to the proxy signal (diagnosis PROVEN airtight); if tokacc collapses to ~0 (random digits), GDN3 WAS contributing the format signal (diagnosis WRONG, search reopens). The one test that converts the inference into proof.
